name: Project.Feature.Command.SequentialCommandExecutionControl_Feature
observations: Pausable/resumable/cancellable sequential command execution for Commander window.
Architecture: ExecutionState enum (IDLE/RUNNING/PAUSED/CANCELLED) + signal-driven control flow.
Integration: SequentialCommandProcessorâ†’NodeTreePresenterâ†’NodeTreeView with 3 control buttons (Pause/Resume/Cancel).
Visual tracking: current_file_processing signal emits file path â†’ tree auto-expands + highlights current item.
created:2025-10-09,modified:2025-10-09,refs:0

name: Project.Method.Service.SequentialCommandProcessorPause_Method
observations: Pauses sequential command execution by setting state to PAUSED.
Located in src/commander/services/sequential_command_processor.py.
Gating mechanism: _process_next_token() checks state and returns early if PAUSED.
Emits execution_state_changed signal for UI button state management.
created:2025-10-09,modified:2025-10-09,refs:0

name: Project.Method.Service.SequentialCommandProcessorResume_Method
observations: Resumes paused sequential execution by setting state to RUNNING and calling _process_next_token().
Located in src/commander/services/sequential_command_processor.py.
Continues from current token index without losing progress.
Emits execution_state_changed signal and status message.
created:2025-10-09,modified:2025-10-09,refs:0

name: Project.Method.Service.SequentialCommandProcessorCancel_Method
observations: Cancels sequential execution by setting state to CANCELLED and calling _finish_processing().
Located in src/commander/services/sequential_command_processor.py.
Cleanup: ends batch logging, clears command queue, resets state to IDLE.
Works from both RUNNING and PAUSED states.
created:2025-10-09,modified:2025-10-09,refs:0

name: Project.Method.Presenter.NodeTreePresenterHighlightCurrentFile_Method
observations: Highlights currently processing file in node tree with auto-expansion.
Located in src/commander/presenters/node_tree_presenter.py.
Logic: Look up file in file_item_map â†’ expand all parent nodes recursively â†’ setCurrentItem + scrollToItem.
Triggers lazy loading via _expand_to_file() if item not found in map.
created:2025-10-09,modified:2025-10-09,refs:0

name: Project.UIPattern.Control.ExecutionControlButtons_Pattern
observations: Three-button control pattern: Pause (RUNNINGâ†’PAUSED), Resume (PAUSEDâ†’RUNNING), Cancel (RUNNING|PAUSEDâ†’IDLE).
Button states managed by execution_state_changed signal from processor.
Located below 'Print All Nodes' button in NodeTreeView horizontal layout.
Enable/disable logic: IDLE=all disabled, RUNNING=pause+cancel enabled, PAUSED=resume+cancel enabled.
created:2025-10-09,modified:2025-10-09,refs:0

name: Global.ArchitecturalPattern.Command.ExecutionStateMachine_Pattern
observations: State machine for controlling long-running command execution with pause/resume/cancel capabilities.
States: IDLE (ready), RUNNING (executing), PAUSED (suspended), CANCELLED (terminating).
Transitions: IDLEâ†’RUNNING (start), RUNNINGâ†’PAUSED (pause), PAUSEDâ†’RUNNING (resume), RUNNING|PAUSEDâ†’CANCELLEDâ†’IDLE (cancel).
Gating: Check state at entry point (_process_next_token) before advancing to next item.
Universal applicability: Any sequential batch processing system with user control requirements.
created:2025-10-09,modified:2025-10-09,refs:0

name: Global.UIPattern.Tracking.VisualExecutionTracking_Pattern
observations: Visual tracking pattern: emit signal with item identifier â†’ lookup in map â†’ expand parents â†’ highlight current.
Recursive parent expansion: traverse parent() chain upward, expanding each level.
Auto-scrolling: setCurrentItem + scrollToItem to ensure visibility.
Lazy loading integration: trigger tree expansion if item not yet loaded.
Universal applicability: Any tree-based UI showing progress through hierarchical data.
created:2025-10-09,modified:2025-10-09,refs:0
